title: Beau Broadway
writer: Malcolm St. Clair, F. Hugh Herbert, George O'Hara
actors: Lew Cody, Aileen Pringle, Sue Carol
plot: Gambler and fight promoter Jim Lambert, grants Gunner O'Brien his dying wish and agrees to care for Gunner's granddaughter, Mona, believing her to be a child. Mona turns out to be a beautiful young woman, however, and Jim overnigh...
